retry_reason: kref_get unconditionally increments the refcount; no failure path exists, so retry is never needed.
contract_summary: Acquire a reference on the carl9170_tx_info structure embedded in the skb's control buffer. The refcount is incremented via kref_get. The caller must hold a valid reference to the skb and must eventually release the acquired reference with a corresponding kref_put (e.g., via carl9170_tx_put_skb). This function does not return any value and always succeeds. It is typically called when taking ownership of a cloned skb or extending the lifetime of the TX info.
